subject: fix double commit processing
title: Fixed duplicate changelog entries
summary: The changelog builder was processing commits twice in some cases, creating duplicates. That's now fixed.

subject: collapse nav items to more
title: Navigation menu collapses to "more"
summary: Added a collapsible menu for navigation items that pops out from a "more" button on smaller screens. Keeps the header cleaner without sacrificing access to secondary pages.

subject: add automated changelog
title: Built a changelog system
summary: Created an automated changelog that pulls entries from git commits. Each commit can include metadata about what changed, and it all gets compiled into a dedicated changelog page.

subject: redesign error pages
title: Error pages redesigned
summary: Gave the 404 and error pages a proper refresh. They're way less boring now and hopefully more useful when something goes wrong.

subject: fix older card truncation
title: Fixed older card truncation
summary: Older blog post cards were getting cut off. Small CSS fix to make sure they display properly.

subject: prev/next post
title: Added previous/next post navigation
summary: Blog posts now have links to the previous and next posts in the series, making it easier to browse through related content.

subject: copy email toast
title: Toast notification for email copying
summary: Added a toast component that appears when you copy my email address. It's a small thing but makes the interaction feel a bit more polished.

subject: add error states
title: Error handling for API integrations
summary: Added error states across GitHub, Spotify, and Strava integrations so things don't silently break when the APIs are down or acting weird.

subject: better sentry errors
title: Improved error tracking
summary: Set up better error reporting to Sentry so I can actually see what's breaking in production instead of just hoping for the best.

subject: more sentry
title: Added error tracking with Sentry
summary: Integrated Sentry across API endpoints for better visibility into production errors and issues.

subject: add sentry
title: Integrated Sentry error tracking
summary: Added Sentry to catch and log runtime errors. Should help me spot issues faster without manually checking the console.

subject: fix chunk load error after deploy
title: Fixed chunk load error after deploy
summary: Added an error page component and deployed a fix for chunk loading issues that were happening after pushing new builds to production.

subject: remove subtitle
title: Removed subtitle from Running page
summary: Cleaned up the Running page by removing the subtitle. Keeping things simpler.

subject: fix running loading state
title: Fixed running page loading state
summary: The loading indicator on the running page was getting stuck. Refactored the state management to fix it.

subject: add rss
title: Added RSS feed for the blog
summary: You can now subscribe to an RSS feed of new blog posts. Set it up in your reader of choice and never miss an update.

subject: remove orange dots
title: Removed orange dots from site
summary: Cleaned up some visual clutter that was scattered across various pages. They weren't adding much value, so out they go.

subject: always use gradient title
title: Always use gradient title styling
summary: Made the gradient title style consistent across all pages instead of using it selectively. Now blog, error, and speaking pages all get the same treatment.

subject: add contributions to cmdk
title: Added cmdk contributions
summary: Built out the command palette component with contributions to cmdk. Made it possible to quickly navigate around the site with keyboard shortcuts.

subject: github loading state
title: Added loading state for GitHub contributions
summary: The GitHub contributions widget now shows a loading skeleton while fetching data instead of staying blank. Makes the page feel less janky when it's loading.

subject: add github contributions
title: Github contributions section
summary: Added a new section to the home page that pulls in my recent Github contributions and displays them. Built a little API handler and component for this.

subject: fix mobile nav
title: Mobile navigation fixed
summary: The mobile nav was being a bit janky. Cleaned up the component and now it actually works without weird spacing or timing issues.

subject: add strava
title: Added Strava running stats page
summary: Integrated with Strava API to pull running activity data. New Running page shows stats and activity map.

subject: now playing loading state
title: Now playing loading state
summary: Added a loading skeleton to the now playing section so it doesn't look broken while fetching what's currently spinning.

subject: better map loading
title: Optimized map component loading
summary: Simplified the WorldMap component and cut down some bloat. Maps should feel snappier now.

subject: cmdk fixes
title: Command palette improvements
summary: Fixed issues with the command palette component. Added some styling tweaks and updates to how it works with the timeline.

subject: fallback to recently played
title: Now playing falls back to recently played
summary: When Spotify isn't currently playing anything, the now playing widget now shows your most recently played track instead of sitting empty.

subject: fix duplicate polling
title: Fixed duplicate Spotify polling
summary: The now playing widget was making redundant API calls. Consolidated the polling logic to hit the endpoint once instead of twice.

subject: now playing
title: Now playing widget
summary: Added a now playing widget to show what music I'm currently listening to. Pulls data from Spotify and displays it on the home page.

subject: loads of updates
title: Added world map and now playing
summary: Built an interactive world map to track travels and a now playing component showing current Spotify track. Also added a bunch of supporting infrastructure like the Spotify auth flow and map data generation scripts.

subject: add map data
title: Map data generation script
summary: Added a build script to generate map unit data. The site now has a data pipeline for mapping features.

subject: og images
title: Added dynamic OG image generation
summary: Built out a system to automatically generate Open Graph images for pages. Each page gets its own custom preview image when shared on social media or other platforms.

subject: add vercel analytics
title: Added Vercel analytics
summary: Started tracking page views and interactions with Vercel Analytics to see what content people actually visit.

subject: cap number of posts on home page
title: Home page now shows fewer posts
summary: Capped the number of posts displayed on the home page to keep things from getting too cluttered as the archive grows.

subject: animate timeline
title: Timeline animations added
summary: The timeline component now animates in when you visit the page. Each entry fades and slides up as it comes into view.

subject: diss
title: Added dissertation PDF
summary: Put my dissertation online. It's about something I spent way too much time thinking about in university.

subject: redesign
title: Redesigned the whole site
summary: Migrated from Next.js to Vite, completely rebuilt the UI with new components and styling. Dropped a bunch of tooling and dependencies in the process.

subject: add incident.io to timeline
title: Added incident.io to timeline
summary: Updated the timeline component to include incident.io. Just tracking another part of my journey.

subject: update bio with incident.io
title: Updated bio to mention incident.io
summary: Added a mention of incident.io to my bio, since I've been working with them lately.

subject: fix selection colour
title: Fixed text selection colour
summary: The colour when you highlight text was looking off. gave it a proper tweak.

subject: cv
title: Added CV as downloadable PDF
summary: Added a CV PDF that visitors can download from the site. Just seemed like a good thing to have available.

subject: clickable logos
title: Made logos clickable in timeline
summary: Timeline logos now link to their respective projects or sites. Makes it easier to explore what I've worked on.

subject: update timeline
title: Refactored timeline component
summary: Simplified the timeline code and trimmed down the markup. It should be easier to maintain and modify going forward.

subject: content updates
title: Updated about section and timeline
summary: Refreshed the about page with a new photo and expanded the timeline with more details about what I've been up to.

subject: supabase pausing blog post
title: Published Supabase pausing guide
summary: New post on preventing Supabase projects from pausing unexpectedly. Covers practical workarounds if you're running hobby-tier projects.

subject: remove force dynamic on blog posts
title: Blog posts now statically rendered
summary: Removed force dynamic rendering from blog posts. They'll now be statically generated, which should improve performance.

subject: add rsc streaming with suspense
title: Added RSC streaming with suspense
summary: Blog posts now stream in parts using React Server Components and Suspense, so the page renders faster while heavier components load in the background.

subject: prevent supabase project from pausing
title: Keep Supabase project alive
summary: Added a health check endpoint that pings Supabase regularly to prevent the project from pausing due to inactivity.

subject: fix nextjs hydration localstorage
title: Fixed hydration issues with localStorage
summary: Added a ClientOnly wrapper component to prevent Next.js hydration mismatches when accessing localStorage on the client side. This fixes the like button breaking on page reload.

subject: post likes
title: Added like button for blog posts
summary: Posts now have a working like button that stores likes in the database. I added a new heart icon and some client-side components to handle the interactions.

subject: local dev db
title: Added local dev database setup
summary: Set up a local database using Docker Compose for development. Now I can test database stuff without needing external services.

subject: add blog meta
title: Added metadata to blog posts
summary: Blog post pages now include metadata like publish date and reading time, which helps with SEO and gives readers a better sense of the content before diving in.

subject: markdown table cells post
title: Rendering rich markdown table cells
summary: Published a new post about how to render markdown content inside table cells, including a walkthrough of the approach I built for this site.

subject: support markdown emojis
title: Markdown emoji support
summary: Added support for using markdown emojis in posts. You can now just type `:smile:` instead of pasting the actual emoji character.

subject: shrink blog text size
title: Blog text size reduced
summary: Made the font size a bit smaller on blog posts. Was feeling too chunky before.

subject: fix inline code styling
title: Fixed inline code styling
summary: Inline code blocks now render with proper styling via Tailwind config tweaks.

subject: typed routes
title: Added type-safe route definitions
summary: Set up typed routes to catch broken links at build time instead of discovering them at runtime. Should make refactoring less error-prone.

subject: speed insights
title: Added speed insights reporting
summary: Added a package to track and report on site performance metrics. Helps me keep an eye on whether things are actually getting slower over time.

subject: analytics
title: Added analytics tracking
summary: Set up analytics to see how people are actually using the site. Nothing fancy, just getting the basics in place.

subject: downsizing post
title: Wrote downsizing post
summary: Published a new post about downsizing. Added some substantial content exploring thoughts on reducing possessions and simplifying life.

subject: zoom image on hover
title: Images zoom on hover
summary: Added a little zoom effect when you hover over images in the blog grid. Nice way to signal they're interactive.

subject: show unpublished posts in dev
title: Unpublished posts now visible in dev
summary: Made it easier to preview draft posts while developing. They'll only show up locally, not on the live site.

subject: draft posts
title: Draft post support
summary: Added a way to mark posts as drafts so they won't show up on the blog yet. Started drafting a couple new posts.

subject: fix mobile view
title: Fixed mobile layout issues
summary: Adjusted responsive styling on the home page and talk list component so they display properly on smaller screens.

subject: auto-refresh now playing
title: Now playing auto-refreshes
summary: The now playing widget on the homepage now updates automatically instead of requiring a manual refresh. It checks for new tracks every 30 seconds when you're on the site.

subject: update content for nx talk
title: Updated content for Nx talk
summary: Added some notes to my Nx monorepos talk page and tweaked the talk listing on the homepage.

subject: header background
title: Updated header background styling
summary: Changed up the GlobalNav component's background styling. Nothing major, just tweaking how the header looks.

subject: social icons component
title: Extracted social icons component
summary: Pulled the social icons into their own component for reuse across the site. Made it easier to maintain and show up in more places.

subject: fix stale spotify data
title: Fixed stale Spotify data
summary: The Spotify integration wasn't refreshing properly, so now it fetches fresh data instead of showing outdated tracks and stats.

subject: add talks
title: Added speaking page with talks
summary: Created a new speaking section to showcase talks. Added individual talk pages and a list component to display them.

subject: refactor
title: Extracted Timeline component
summary: Moved timeline rendering logic from the main page into its own Timeline component. Makes the page template cleaner and the component more reusable.

subject: now playing
title: Now playing display
summary: Added a now playing widget that shows what I'm listening to on Spotify in real-time on the site footer.

subject: blog about box
title: Added about author box to blog
summary: Blog posts now display an about author box at the bottom with some info about me.

subject: Initial commit from Create Next App
